results.title: EPA must act on glyphosate after Supreme Court's Monsanto ruling
results.description: The Supreme Court has granted legal immunity to Bayer, maker of the weedkiller Roundup, from lawsuits alleging that the chemical glyphosate causes cancer.

results.title: 'Stupid man!' - A Plus descends on flood victim who 'insulted' him over poor drainage
results.description: The Member of Parliament (MP) for Gomoa Central, Kwame Asare Obeng, popularly known as A-Plus, has lashed out at a flood victim, calling him a 'stupid man' and a 'fool' after the resident appealed to him to prioritise drainage infrastructure over...

results.title: ‘Stupid man!’ - A Plus descends on flood victim who 'insulted' him over poor drainage in his constituency

results.title: US and Iran negotiators head to Doha, but meeting uncertain
results.description: A senior Iranian diplomat said on Monday that technical talks between the working groups of Iran and the United States were not scheduled for this week, according to Iran's semi-official Fars News Agency.

results.title: Adhere to SIR rules or face action: Telangana CEO to BLOs
results.description: The CEO said Booth Level Officers and election authorities had successfully distributed nearly 1.73 crore Enumeration Forms to voters within just four days.
